body_text: Hi {{1}}, this is a reminder that your antenatal appointment is scheduled for {{2}} at {{3}}. Please reply YES to confirm or call us to reschedule.
name: appointment_reminder

body_text: Birth notification: Baby {{1}} was born on {{2}} at {{3}}. Mother and baby are doing well. Community midwife follow-up will be arranged within 24 hours.
name: birth_notification

body_text: Reminder: your appointment on {{1}} at {{2}} is confirmed.
name: appointment_confirmation

body_text: Your verification code is {{1}}. It expires in 10 minutes.
name: otp_verify

body_text: Hi {{1}}, did our support resolve your issue today?
name: support_followup

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your postnatal home visit is scheduled for {{2}} between {{3}} and {{4}}. Please ensure someone is home. Contact us at +353875557744 with any questions.
name: postnatal_visit_reminder

body_text: Your HSE West midwifery referral has been received and assigned to community midwife {{1}}. You will be contacted within {{2}} working days.
name: referral_acknowledgement

body_text: Reminder: your NUIG Masters module {{1}} assignment is due on {{2}}. Please submit via the Blackboard portal before midnight.
name: nuig_assignment_reminder

body_text: The Birth Centre Working Group meeting is scheduled for {{1}} at {{2}}. Location: {{3}}. Please confirm attendance.
name: bcwg_meeting_reminder

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your breastfeeding support session with the HSE lactation consultant is confirmed for {{2}} at {{3}}.
name: breastfeeding_support_reminder

body_text: Hampton's Rest B&B: your booking for {{1}} night(s) arriving {{2}} is confirmed. Check-in from 15:00. Contact: +353957557744.
name: bnb_booking_confirmation

body_text: Your NRP recertification is due for renewal on {{1}}. Please book your assessment via the HSE CPD portal or contact your line manager.
name: cpd_renewal_reminder

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your 36-week antenatal check is due. Please contact your community midwife to schedule your appointment at your earliest convenience.
name: antenatal_check_36wk

body_text: HSE West Birth Centre Consultation: your feedback submission has been received. Thank you for supporting community maternity services in Galway.
name: consultation_response_received

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your on-call week begins {{2}}. Please ensure your bleep is active and check in with the UHG maternity unit by 08:00.
name: oncall_week_reminder
